title: Crunchy Smoky Tomato Stir-fry
description: A savory and crunchy Venezuelan dish featuring hot smoked paprika in a whole30-friendly recipe that's perfect for sick days.
instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat.
Add chopped onions and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add halved tomatoes to the pan. Cover with pineapple juice or water and bring to a simmer.
Stir in hot smoked paprika and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Simmer for about 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally until tomatoes are tender but still have some texture.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
